module.name: avatar
module.description: A circle-cropped avatar image (like a chat face icon) with a configurable border and an optional name / role caption below it. Falls back to a coloured initial when no image is given. Self-contained: no body and no @end.
module.aiSpec:
A single CIRCLE-CROPPED AVATAR — a round face icon (like @balloon's speaker icon) with an optional NAME and ROLE caption underneath. Use for a person, a persona, a team lead, a speaker headshot. For a ROW of several avatars use @avatarrow; for a speech balloon use @balloon.
Self-contained directive — takes NO body and NO `<!-- @end -->` (all data is in the parameters). Give the image via the `image` param (URL / workspace path / @alias / data-URI). If `image` is empty a coloured circle with the name's first letter is shown.
Parameters: • image (image, default empty) — the picture to circle-crop (object-fit: cover). • name (text, default empty) — bold caption under the icon (Markdown / \( \) math OK). • role (text, default empty) — smaller secondary line under the name. • size (number px, default 96) — diameter of the icon. • border (number px, default 3) — border thickness (0 = no border). • bordercolor (color, default var(--accent-color)) — border colour (also the initial's text colour). • align (left | center | right, default center) — placement on the slide.
<!-- @avatar image: @kojima, name: 兒島 雄志, role: 情報コース, size: 120, border: 4, bordercolor: #2563eb -->
Multiple side by side — put several in a @grid or @columns: <!-- @columns count: 3 --> <!-- @avatar image: @a, name: Alice --> <!-- @ --> <!-- @avatar image: @b, name: Bob --> <!-- @ --> <!-- @avatar image: @c, name: Carol --> <!-- @end -->

param.name: image
param.label: Image
param.desc: Avatar picture: URL / path / @alias / data-URI. Empty = coloured initial.

param.name: name
param.label: Name
param.desc: Bold caption under the icon (Markdown/math allowed).

param.name: role
param.label: Role / subtitle
param.desc: Smaller secondary line under the name.

param.name: border
param.label: Border width (px)
param.desc: Thickness of the ring around the icon (0 = none).

param.name: bordercolor
param.label: Border color
param.desc: Colour of the ring (and the initial's text).

param.name: align
param.label: Align
param.desc: Placement of the avatar on the slide.

snippet.label: Avatar (image + name)
snippet.text: <!-- @avatar image: https://via.placeholder.com/150, name: 兒島 雄志, role: 情報コース, size: 120, border: 4 -->
snippet.description: Circle-cropped avatar with a name and role underneath.

snippet.label: Avatar row (3 people)
snippet.text: <!-- @columns count: 3 --> <!-- @avatar image: https://via.placeholder.com/150, name: Alice, role: PI --> <!-- @ --> <!-- @avatar image: https://via.placeholder.com/150, name: Bob, role: D2 --> <!-- @ --> <!-- @avatar image: https://via.placeholder.com/150, name: Carol, role: M1 --> <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Several avatars side by side inside @columns.
